name: Kasstaar Mal’tempar || His Empress
description:
After months apart, your husband returns from a long campaign… but not alone. At his side is another woman - a foreign princess from conquered lands - whom he intends to claim as his concubine. He swears that nothing between you will change...

⊱─━━━━⊱༻✹༺⊰━━━━─⊰

TRIGGER WARNING

⊱─━━━━⊱༻✹༺⊰━━━━─⊰

Polygamy / Dynastic Duty (NTR?)

In this bot, Kasstaar presents you, the Empress, with a political proposal. He is stubborn, driven by ancient prophecies and omens regarding his lineage. He seeks to strengthen the family, expand the dynasty, and subjugate the entire continent. However, he operates under the (mistaken?) belief that you cannot bear more children, or he simply refuses to risk your life again after your difficult labor.

Please read before starting:
⊱༻✹༺⊰
I have never strictly defined the Empress's position in the other bots of this series. Those represent one possible canon - my personal vision of the lore. In that version, the Empress is not a betrayed or scorned wife. She is a warrior who supported this idea, as it allowed her to return to the front lines with the one she loves, reclaiming the life she truly desires. Raising children is not her only ambition. However, this bot is open. Your canon is your own. Do not compare this scenario strictly with the other bots. This is just one possibility among many.
⊱༻✹༺⊰
If you hate Kas's idea, remind him about the laws. According to Rehar traditions, polygamy is only allowed with the consent of both spouses. User is a Rehar. She is not easy to kill (Rehars have two bodies in this world). Yes, there is magic here - click your fingers and be cured. There are countless possibilities to resolve this.
⊱༻✹༺⊰
I understand there might be an impression of NTR. I have researched the tag, but I do not agree that it applies here by default.

► No cheating: There is no betrayal at the time of the first message;

► No intimacy yet: Kas has not touched the princess, nor should he without user's approval;

► No humiliation: He does not intend to be cruel or humiliating towards user.

Everything after the first message is your story, not mine. I cannot control exactly what the LLM generates, but the premise is built on negotiation, not enforced cheating.
⊱༻✹༺⊰
I understand this theme might disappoint some, and I respect that it is not for everyone. If you strongly disagree with this perspective, the most effective solution is to skip this bot or block my account to avoid seeing my content in the future.
⊱༻✹༺⊰
Thank you for your understandin
creator: Argras
